title: Chocolate Mousse Cheesecake
excerpt: People think making a cheesecake is hard. Not this one. This one asks to be made.
html: People think making a cheesecake is hard. Not this one. This one asks to be made.

steps: Crush the Oreo biscuits finely in a food processor.
Melt the butter in the microwave and mix with the biscuits.
Grease a springform pan and press the biscuit mixture firmly into the pan.  Put in the fridge to set.
In a bowl, whip the cream with 100 ml castor sugar and the vanilla to soft peaks.
In another bowl, beat the cream cheese, mascarpone, sifted cocoa and remaining 60 ml castor sugar until soft and well combined.
Melt the Lindt chocolate with 30 ml milk in the microwave. Stir it into the cheese mixture.
Now fold the cream into the cheese mixture.
Spoon out onto the Oreo base and leave in your fridge for at least 4 hours.
Remove it from your springform pan and decorate with a Flake, berries or whatever you have at home.
